sandboxFiles.name: site_enablement_strategy_v2.doc
sandboxFiles.content:
# OncoTrials Site Enablement & CRC Onboarding Blueprint

**Author:** Priya Patel (Product Marketing Manager) & David Ross (VP Network Growth)

### Overview
Strategies for rapidly scaling OncoTrials point-of-care clinical trial screening across 250+ community oncology practices.

### Key Milestones
1. **Week 1-2:** OncoEMR system integration & biomarker data pipeline activation.
2. **Week 3:** Clinical Research Coordinator (CRC) workflow training session.
3. **Week 4:** Full go-live with biopharma trial enrollment tracking.

sandboxFiles.name: biopharma_partnership_proposal.doc
sandboxFiles.content:
# Flatiron Real-World Evidence & Trial Accelerator - Biopharma Overview

**Strategic Value Proposition for Sponsor Partners:**
- Access to de-identified real-world clinical data from 3.5M+ cancer patients across community practices.
- Accelerating protocol accrual rates by 3x through automated point-of-care matching.

sandboxFiles.name: gtm_executive_pitch.gslides
sandboxFiles.content:
# OncoTrials Network Expansion & Biopharma GTM Deck

> **3.4x Accrual Speedup**: Accelerated point-of-care clinical trial screening across 250+ community oncology practices.

- **TAM & SAM Growth**: Serviceable market reaching 3.5M+ active cancer patient EHR records in real-time.
- **Biopharma Sponsor Access**: Real-time de-identified clinical evidence streams connecting sponsor protocols to active sites.

---

# Practice Onboarding & Regional Pipeline

## Community Practice Scale-Up

- **Texas Oncology Associates**: 48 Oncologists live on OncoEMR — active CRC workflow training.
- **Rocky Mountain Cancer Centers**: 24 Oncologists live on OncoEMR — biomarker gateway setup.
- **Highlands Oncology Group**: 16 Oncologists integrated — staff protocol kickoff scheduled.

## Onboarding Metrics

- **Active Network Sites**: `142 active sites` onboarded (+18 community sites added this month).
- **Monthly Patient Screening**: `18,450 EHR records` auto-screened with 2,140 point-of-care alerts triggered.

---

# Biopharma Partnership Architecture

## Real-World Evidence & Accrual Gateway

- **Automated Eligibility Checks**: Instant protocol matching reduces patient screening time by `66%`.
- **EHR Integration Gateways**: Zero-friction HL7 FHIR pipelines connect directly to community practice workflows.
- **Protocol Velocity Guarantee**: Sponsor partners receive verified eligibility alerts within 12 hours of patient intake.
